channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google adds AI image generation to Chrome browser, side panel option for virtual assistant
item.description: Google is empowering its Chrome browser with the ability to alter pictures and introducing a side panel for a virtual assistant to help with online tasks as part of its push to turbocharge its of digital services with more artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Napoli vs Chelsea Free Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Napoli vs Chelsea in the 2025/26 Champions League with both sides in desperate need of three points.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra’s privacy display could be the biggest upgrade in years – here’s how it works
item.description: Samsung has now detailed the long-rumored privacy display feature we're expecting to launch with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra.
item.dc:creator: James Rogerson, TechRadar

item.title: Mplify launches AI-focused Carrier Ethernet certifications
item.description: The Carrier Ethernet market is undergoing a significant shift as AI workloads demand new performance validation from network infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Disney child star-turned-CEO raises $100 million for California space-antenna firm
item.description: The money will be used to help Northwood expand manufacturing and production, supporting space missions that need to happen on tight timelines, the startup said Tuesday. The company declined to give its valuation.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Teradata unveils enterprise AgentStack to push AI agents into production
item.description: Teradata has expanded the agent-building capabilities it launched last year into a full-blown toolkit, which it says will help enterprises address the challenge of moving AI agents beyond pilots into production-grade deployments.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: France just approved a social media ban for kids under 15
item.description: French lawmakers approved a bill banning social media for children under 15, paving the way for the measure to enter into force at the start of the next school year in September, as the idea of setting a minimum age for use of the platforms gains momentum across Europe.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok, YouTube, and Meta are headed to court for a landmark trial over social media addiction
item.description: Three of the world’s biggest tech companies face a landmark trial in Los Angeles starting this week over claims that their platforms—Meta’s Instagram, ByteDance’s TikTok, and Google’s YouTube—deliberately addict and harm children.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: In Davos, warnings about AI and jobs
item.description: The impact of AI on the labor market is more serious than previously expected, with entry-level jobs collapsing and white-collar jobs in danger, participants at the World Economic Forum (WEF) said last week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel’s AI pivot could make lower-end PCs scarce in 2026
item.description: In 2026, lower-end PCs may be more difficult to come by, and for those that are available, price tags may rise. This is fallout from Intel’s plans to pivot its manufacturing capacity from chips for PCs to Xeon processors to support intensive AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon layoffs expected to disproportionately hit AWS and tech talent
item.description: As the market slows down, AWS and other Amazon units are preparing for another round of layoffs, which is expected to overwhelmingly impact tech talent. “Amazon is planning a second round of job cuts next week as part of its broader goal of trimming some 30,000 corporate workers,” Reuters reported.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Workforce, supply chain factor into reauthorizing National Quantum Initiative
item.description: House and Senate lawmakers are both advancing legislation to reauthorize and update the National Quantum Initiative. The post Workforce, supply chain factor into reauthorizing National Quantum Initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
